projects.title: StatViz — Interactive Statistics Dashboard
projects.description: A web-based dashboard for visualizing statistical distributions, hypothesis tests, and regression outputs. Built to help students understand core stat concepts visually.
projects.members: Jensen Huang, Sam Altman, Satya Nadella

projects.title: ML Notebook Archive
projects.description: A curated, well-documented collection of Jupyter notebooks covering core ML algorithms from scratch — linear regression to transformers — maintained for club workshops.
projects.members: Demis Hassabis, Sundar Pichai, Tim Cook

projects.title: CU Attendance Tracker — EduTrack
projects.description: A smart attendance management system for university departments, featuring QR-based check-in, automated reports, and department-level analytics.
projects.members: Jeff Bezos, Larry Page, Sergey Brin

projects.title: AgriSense — Crop Monitoring System
projects.description: An IoT-integrated smart farming tool that uses sensor data and ML models to predict crop health, water needs, and yield estimates. Winner of DU Tech Fest Hackathon 2024.
projects.members: Steve Jobs, Steve Wozniak, Paul Allen

projects.title: NLP for Low-Resource Bangla
projects.description: Research project on natural language processing for Bangla — a low-resource language. Focuses on named entity recognition and sentiment analysis using fine-tuned transformer models.
projects.members: Marie Curie, Richard Feynman, Niels Bohr

projects.title: Quantum-Classical Hybrid Optimizer
projects.description: Developing a hybrid algorithm that utilizes quantum annealing for hard combinatorial problems while leveraging classical gradient descent for fine-tuning.
projects.members: Nikola Tesla, Albert Einstein, Stephen Hawking

projects.title: Neural Architecture Search for Edge Devices
projects.description: Automating the design of efficient deep learning architectures optimized for low-power mobile and IoT hardware without sacrificing accuracy.
projects.members: Jensen Huang, Demis Hassabis, Sam Altman

projects.title: Ethical AI Framework for Global Governance
projects.description: Establishing a mathematical framework for fairness and accountability in AI systems, aimed at creating global standards for algorithmic transparency.
projects.members: Satya Nadella, Tim Cook, Bill Gates
